notFound.title: Storefront Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for isn't available. Make sure the link you opened is correct.

inactive.desc: {{namaBisnis}} is temporarily not accepting bookings. Please check back later.

loadError.title: Failed to Load Page
loadError.desc: Something went wrong while loading this storefront. Try reloading the page.

transport.title: Travel Fee
transport.flatDesc: A flat travel fee of {{nominal}} applies to all locations.

availability.title: Check Availability
availability.desc: Pick a date to see the open time slots.
availability.hint: Pick a date to see available slots.
availability.empty: No available slots on this date.
availability.loadError: Failed to load availability. Try another date.

booking.title: Online Booking Coming Soon
booking.desc: Online booking is on its way. For now, please contact the MUA directly through their social media contact to make an appointment.

report.title: Report This Page
report.desc: Let us know if this page violates our terms (inappropriate content, scam, etc).
report.alasanPlaceholder: Explain your reason for reporting (minimum 10 characters)
report.toastThrottle: Too many attempts. Please try again shortly.
report.toastError: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
